body.title: Skills/CLAUDE.md/MCP substrate cleanup + next-session handoff (2026-06-27)
body.text:
SESSION CONTEXT (carries what compaction won't):
"Opus felt like Haiku" was diagnosed to TWO causes:
(1) a single session run 10 days / 124 compactions -> recursive context rot (fixed by starting fresh);
(2) a self-contradicting instruction surface -> CLAUDE.md said flat-file memory / no-TheIgors /
UU_ROOT-only, while ~30 skills still said palace / wild_igor / IGOR_HOME / CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS. The
contradiction is what made the model stop trusting its own instructions and improvise (e.g. the
"rebuild the MCP bus from scratch, it's not there" rabbit hole, despite the CLAUDE.md guard that has
existed since 2026-05-31 — present but drowned out by the degraded context).

WHAT WAS FIXED (3 commits on main, all bash -n / py_compile clean):
- 1b01e022 docs: CLAUDE.md self-contradiction (the /sorted -> /migrate-decisions design-workflow
  section pointed at the DELETED /migrate-decisions skill + retired lab/design_docs/); manifest.json
  dropped the deleted goal + audit-goal skills.
- ecd8da20 palace -> flat-file store + TheIgors-cognition gut: day-close Step 12 (palace.days write
  -> flat-file day roll-up note; dropped dead DSB/docs_sync step); outcome / weekly-retro /
  audit-hypothesis (palace decision queries -> glob over devlab/runtime/memory/decisions/*.json);
  audit-audits (marked UNBUILT design-spec; IgorBase -> BaseDevice); eval-run (TheIgors-cognition
  evals marked deferred; ticket eval -> flat-file; output -> notes/); day-close-audit (gutted 4
  wild_igor steps, fixed 2 Python syntax errors, schema check -> memory-dir check); audit-day
  (retired 2 TheIgors-cognition steps); audit-smell (Check 8 palace guidance -> flat-file;
  SmellEngine(IgorBase) -> BaseDevice).
- b564910d env-var elimination (CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS/IGOR_HOME -> ${UU_ROOT:-...}/devlab/claudecode and
  uu_home() across ~25 skills); TheIgors path purge (query-ticket sourced TheIgors/venv — hard-rule
  violation — removed; wild_igor/igor -> devices/; dropped retired lab/ from grep targets); stripped
  model: pins (-> inherit session Opus) from load-bearing skills (context-load, sorted, sprint,
  sprint-batch, sprint-ticket, audit-precode, audit-ticket, critic; audit-design + audit-hypothesis
  kept explicit opus); phantom/stale fixes (ticket /savestateauto -> /savestate; audit-ticket
  skill-consumer path .claude/skills -> repo skills/; audit-expert --area keys synced to run map;
  commit + sprint-ticket trailer Opus 4.6 -> 4.8; readinbox/sprint-ticket hardcoded paths -> UU_ROOT).
Also: ~/.mcp.json emptied (the three dead Igor-wild-0001 servers removed; not a repo file).

FIRST ACTION NEXT SESSION — verify the restore actually works (don't assume):
confirm UU skills load (/context-load, /sorted available), you're on Opus, and spot-run one rewritten
skill that used to hit Postgres (e.g. /outcome list-mode or /weekly-retro Step 1) to confirm the
flat-file glob returns with no psql/adc.palace error.

DEFERRED BACKLOG — /sorted these (cleanup commits closed UNPROVEN: grep-verified, not
proof-on-close; a decision capturing this reconciliation is worth filing too):
1. audit-audits + eval-run are now honestly-marked unbuilt/partially-deferred design specs — they
   assume a UU telemetry/cognition substrate that doesn't exist. Ticket the substrate, not a fake.
2. context-load/run instance internals: local var named IGOR_HOME (assigned from uu_home(),
   functional) + IGOR_INSTANCE_ID-based resolution -> reconcile to canonical CC_TMUX_SESSION
   instance-id resolution during the substrate pass. Left working, not churned blind.
3. day-close-audit Step 18.6 reads $IGOR_INSTANCE_ID/igor.switches.cfg gate-state; notify keeps the
   CC-wild-0001 instance string — functional-but-TheIgors-shaped; confirm or canonicalize.
4. MCP: re-add bus/storage servers only when one runs against a live credential.
5. THE BIG DEFERRED THREAD (Akien is doing this next on purpose): gather all dev-process artifacts
   onto the one canonical substrate (devlab/runtime/memory/) so tools and skills operate on the same
   ground.

OPERATING CHANGE TO KEEP: do not run a multi-day session. Start fresh daily; treat /compact as a
within-session stopgap; if you've compacted more than a handful of times, a fresh /context-load beats
another compaction. Consider a tripwire around ~20 compactions.
